title: Venezuelan Sweet Potato Roast
description: A delicious and flavorful dish originating from Venezuela, featuring roasted sweet potatoes.
instructions: Wash the sweet potatoes and poke some holes in them with a fork to allow steam to escape.
Rub the sweet potatoes with the roast oil and sprinkle with salt, garlic, and black pepper.
Place the sweet potatoes on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Roast the sweet potatoes in the preheated oven for 45-50 minutes, or until they are tender when pierced with a fork.
Remove the sweet potatoes from the oven and let them cool for a few minutes before serving.
